final_acceptance_policy: Stage-local PASS proves only synthetic/local boundaries; linked AC-* remain PARTIAL or NOT_RUN until protected canaries, deployment and final review execute.

acceptance_contracts.title: 单一 Gmail OAuth Secret 边界
acceptance_contracts.environment: local synthetic Secret source; no Google call
acceptance_contracts.input: one exact authorized-user JSON object and invalid scope/name controls
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Exactly one fixed Secret name is read; scope is exactly gmail.modify; authority and fields are exact; values are redacted and destroyable.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: Secret reads 1 for valid input; extra scopes 0; credential values in repr/log 0; real Secrets 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Reject credential loading and keep all Gmail operations disabled.

acceptance_contracts.title: Gmail Endpoint Guard
acceptance_contracts.environment: injected recording transport with synthetic IDs
acceptance_contracts.input: five legal operations plus send/delete/thread/batch/modify and authority-bypass controls
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Only messages.list/get, history.list, filters.list and exact message-level messages.trash pass; every forbidden request is rejected before transport.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: forbidden endpoint network calls 0; allowed operation families 5/5
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Disable OAuth use and repair the pre-network guard.

acceptance_contracts.title: Repository ID 和改名守卫
acceptance_contracts.input: same positive Repository ID with two current names, public response and path traversal controls
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Current name is resolved from the immutable ID, private=true is required, rename rebinding invalidates the old locator, and only MooMooAU/ paths are authorized.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: second repository creations 0; cross-repository network calls 0; namespace escapes 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block all private writes and require a fresh protected-ID resolution.

acceptance_contracts.title: 短时 GitHub App Installation Token
acceptance_contracts.environment: runtime-generated synthetic RSA key and injected response transport
acceptance_contracts.input: RS256 App JWT, exact repository_ids/permissions request, narrow and overbroad responses
acceptance_contracts.oracle: JWT lifetime is below ten minutes; Installation Token lifetime is at most one hour; response must name only the target Repository ID and Contents write plus Metadata read; only target Contents/fixed live Release endpoints pass.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: overbroad token acceptances 0; cross-repository network calls 0; token values in repr 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Reject the token, revoke the installation when protected execution exists, and stop private writes.

acceptance_contracts.title: 官方 age 流式边界
acceptance_contracts.environment: official age CLI; in-memory payload streams; temporary synthetic identity root
acceptance_contracts.input: multi-chunk synthetic plaintext and generated synthetic X25519 identity
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Plaintext moves only through pipes and memory, ciphertext is an age envelope, round-trip bytes match, and decrypt identities outside explicitly approved ephemeral roots are rejected.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: round-trip 100%; plaintext payload files 0; unapproved identity roots 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Block persistence and retain all mutation features disabled.

acceptance_contracts.title: Recovery Key 一次性交付状态机
acceptance_contracts.environment: official age-keygen plus synthetic in-memory Secret installer and one-time handoff
acceptance_contracts.input: one generated identity, zero/one/repeated owner claim paths and recipient derivation proof
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Generation creates no key file, local owned buffer is destroyed after handoff, M3 remains ineligible before exactly one claim and a recovery proof, and the private identity never enters repr or committed evidence.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: M3 eligibility before proof 0; accepted claim count exactly 1; committed private keys 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Keep M3 disabled, revoke the partial ceremony through the adapter, and regenerate only in protected deployment.

acceptance_contracts.title: 不可变供应链与安全 CI
acceptance_contracts.environment: local dependency resolver/auditor plus no-Secret GitHub-hosted workflow definition
acceptance_contracts.input: exact direct pins, universal hash lock, CycloneDX SBOM, Action commits, age checksum and OCI digest
acceptance_contracts.oracle: Every transitive Python requirement has SHA-256 hashes, SBOM exactly matches the lock, every Action uses a full commit, age and container inputs use verified digests, and the workflow gates audit, secret scan, CodeQL and dependency review without Artifact/Cache or Secret references.
acceptance_contracts.threshold: unhashed requirements 0; unpinned Actions 0; observed known vulnerabilities 0 at recorded audit time; committed scan reports 0
acceptance_contracts.failure_action: Freeze delivery and update the affected immutable input before any deployment.
